rationale: All three operations (getUser, searchByDisplayName, getUsersByIds) are shown with realistic usage and platform-idiomatic LiveObject/LiveCollection observe patterns; error handling present for most platforms, but no imports visible in any snippet and getUsersByIds Flutter example lacks an error callback.
suggestions: Add import statements to all platform snippets.
Add error handling to the Flutter getUsersByIds example — the Swift and Kotlin versions show it but Dart is missing it.
